name: app.superdocs/superdocs
description: Universal AI document editor — chunk-precise edits with style preservation, multimodal vision, human-in-the-loop approval, and pre-signed URL upload/download. Edit contracts, NDAs, proposals, RFPs, academic papers, technical specs, SOPs from Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Desktop, VS Code, Continue, Zed. 21 tools + 4 user-invocable workflow prompts on a single endpoint. Free tier: 500 operations/month. Sign up: https://use.superdocs.app
